# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in this project, please report it
responsibly by emailing the maintainer directly rather than opening a public issue.

**Contact:** Open a private security advisory via GitHub's
[Security Advisories](https://github.com/billdmar/travel-ai-tai/security/advisories/new) feature.

## Scope

This project does not process real payments or store sensitive user data.
However, security issues in dependencies or the API surface (e.g., injection,
SSRF via the image proxy) are taken seriously.
